site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.

site_brief.title: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

summary: A conversion-focused niche landing page for real estate agents who need an AI that actually operates MLS, CRMs, calendars, email, and listing portals—then remembers how it did it. Super runs real computer workflows and reuses a computer-use cache, making repeated follow-ups, listing updates, and scheduling faster and cheaper over time.
